title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: The video argues that AI agents are now sufficiently capable in coding, research, and planning that they are accelerating real work and beginning to reshape workflows. Demis Hassabis warns humanity may be entering the singularity foothills, with the debate shifting from whether AI is perfect to whether imperfect but useful AI has already become transformative.
